## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review content opportunities and align on next steps for AfterShoot's content marketing strategy with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented initial content clusters and keyword research, but AfterShoot wants to refine further based on their internal keyword research and product focus](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [AfterShoot prefers to prioritize in-market keywords and ICP-focused topics before broader experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Next steps include AfterShoot sharing their internal keyword research and GrowthX refining the content strategy accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
  - [Will start with 2 calibration articles to align on tone, structure, and approach](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Performance

  - [AfterShoot's blog has good authority score and organic search traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [Close to competitors' performance, providing a solid starting point](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Allows for methodical approach rather than desperate tactics](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)

### Content Clusters and Keyword Research

  - [GrowthX presented clusters based on competitor analysis and keyword gap research](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Clusters include: Editing Tools, Equipment Guides, Photography Techniques, Styles/Genres, Workflow Optimization, AI Photo Editing](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [AfterShoot feedback:](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
      - [Equipment Guides and Photography Techniques seen as promising clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)
      - [Editing Tools cluster needs significant refinement (70% off-target)](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
      - [Styles/Genres and Workflow Optimization viewed positively](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)
      - [AI Photo Editing needs manual filtering but has potential](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Content Prioritization Strategy

  - [AfterShoot recommends focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
    1.  In-market keywords
    2.  Out-market keywords focused on ICPs
    3.  Broader experimentation later
  - [Emphasis on proving business case with relevant, converting traffic first](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Balance needed between product-specific content and broader educational pieces](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)

### Calibration Process

  - [Will select 2 topics for initial content creation to calibrate tone, structure, and approach](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Likely starting with Styles/Genres or Equipment clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [AfterShoot to provide feedback on these initial pieces to refine the content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)

### Keyword Research Refinement

  - [AfterShoot to share their internal keyword research sheet and Loom video explaining their approach](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2102.0)
  - [GrowthX to take another pass at keyword research and clustering based on this new information](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [Focus on more in-market and ICP-relevant keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)

## Next Steps

  - [AfterShoot to share internal keyword research sheet and explanatory Loom video](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
  - [AfterShoot to select 2 specific topics for calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2169.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine keyword research and content clusters based on AfterShoot's input](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [GrowthX to create and share a more detailed 8-10 week plan for content production](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)
  - [GrowthX to send meeting recap and specific action items](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
  - [Teams to collaborate on refining the approach to in-market vs. out-market content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Gx7Mw2kbHXyUifEjaEfvtsPTG-yXgD1x?tab=summary&timestamp=2250.0)
